meta.title: PLC's: Backdoors in Disguise
meta.description:
Roee Stark of Indegy shows how the Rockwell Automation controllers can be used to forward attacks through both IP and Controlnet networks. This is due to a very full featured CIP networking stack that lacks authentication.

At the end, Roee points out that authentication in the CIP protocol is needed to address this. Good news! Rockwell Automation has led the efforts to develop and standardize secure EtherNet/IP. You can see info on this in the secure protocols playlist.
